bupt.ta.service

类 AdminService.UserDirectoryReport

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
  • 封闭类:
    AdminService

    public static class AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
extends java.lang.Object
    Filtered user list with per-role activity metrics.
